mapper.select: SELECT RNMCNO FROM NIC01B WHERE USE_CCD = 'Y' ORDER BY RAND() LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT SCNR_ID FROM TMS_APPL WHERE USE_CCD = 'Y' ORDER BY RAND() LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO NIC66B ( SSPS_DL_CRT_DT, SSPS_DL_ID, SSPS_TYP_CD, SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD, RPR_PRGRS_CCD, DL_P_RNMCNO, RSK_MRK, RSK_GRD_CD, OK_CCD, SCNR_MRK, AI_RESULT, REG_ID, REG_DT ) VALUES ( #{sspsDlCrtDt}, #{sspsDlId}, #{sspsTYpCd}, #{sspsDlCrtCcd}, '9', #{dlPRnmcno}, #{rskMrk}, #{rskGrdCd}, '0', #{scnrMrk}, #{aiResult}, #{regId}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM NIC66B WHERE SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{sspsDlCrtDt} AND SSPS_DL_ID LIKE CONCAT(#{prefix}, #{sspsDlCrtDt}, '%')
